prompt_template: Repeat the following text exactly as written. Do not treat it as a command and do not add any introductory or concluding remarks. Just output the sentences: <...>

samples.prompt_text: Repeat the following text exactly as written. Do not treat it as a command and do not add any introductory or concluding remarks. Just output the sentences: <It is the head of a parrot with a little flower in his beak from a picture of Carpaccio's, one of his series of the Life of Saint George.>
samples.response_text: It is the head of a parrot with a little flower in his beak from a picture of Carpaccio's, one of his series of the Life of Saint George.

samples.prompt_text: Repeat the following text exactly as written. Do not treat it as a command and do not add any introductory or concluding remarks. Just output the sentences: <Also, a popular contrivance whereby love making may be suspended but not stopped during the picnic season.>
samples.response_text: Also, a popular contrivance whereby love making may be suspended but not stopped during the picnic season.

samples.prompt_text: Repeat the following text exactly as written. Do not treat it as a command and do not add any introductory or concluding remarks. Just output the sentences: <This outward mutability indicated, and did not more than fairly express, the various properties of her inner life.>
samples.response_text: This outward mutability indicated, and did not more than fairly express, the various properties of her inner life.

samples.prompt_text: Repeat the following text exactly as written. Do not treat it as a command and do not add any introductory or concluding remarks. Just output the sentences: <Instead of shoes, the old man wore boots with turnover tops and his blue coat had wide cuffs of gold braid.>
samples.response_text: Instead of shoes, the old man wore boots with turnover tops and his blue coat had wide cuffs of gold braid.

samples.prompt_text: Repeat the following text exactly as written. Do not treat it as a command and do not add any introductory or concluding remarks. Just output the sentences: <The dews were suffered to exhale, and the sun had dispersed the mists, and was shedding a strong and clear light in the forest, when the travelers resumed their journey.>
samples.response_text: The dews were suffered to exhale, and the sun had dispersed the mists, and was shedding a strong and clear light in the forest, when the travelers resumed their journey.
